CONTENT.Career: In April 2019, Ahlinvi signed with Nîmes Olympique. He made his first team debut with Nîmes in a 3–0 Coupe de la Ligue win over RC Lens on 29 October 2019. He signed his first professional contract with the club in June 2020.On 14 June 2021, he signed a three-year contract with Dijon.
CONTENT.Personal life: Ahlinvi's brother Joris Ahlinvi is also a footballer, who was called up to represent the Benin national football team.
CONTENT.External links: Mattéo Ahlinvi – French league stats at LFP – also available in French (archived)Mattéo Ahlinvi at SoccerwayFFF Profile
CONTENT.International career: Ahlinvi was born in France to a Beninese father and French mother. He was a youth international for France. He debuted for the Benin national team in a friendly 2–0 win over Gabon on 12 October 2020.

SUMMARY: Mattéo Ahlinvi (born 2 July 1999) is a professional footballer who plays as midfielder in Allsvenskan for Västerås SK. Born in France, he plays for the Benin national team.
